{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Yerin's spiritual sense
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin's spiritual sense]] was suppressed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c3">''Underlord'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
